reasoning: The LLM fidelity evaluation found a minor issue with lost visual emphasis, but the automated programmatic detector identified a major structural issue: a bare URL/email address (DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov) was not converted into a proper hyperlink. The programmatic minor observations corroborate that this was blue text in the source without a link annotation, causing it to render as plain text in the output. Since there is exactly one major programmatic defect, the document requires HUMAN_REVIEW according to the count-based routing rules.

concerns.description: 1 bare URL(s) in text not converted to hyperlinks: DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov
concerns.analysis: bare_url_count=1. URLs appear as plain text instead of clickable links. Per NCDIT criteria, link text not wrapped in href is a major defect.

The output loses structural visual emphasis on Page 3. In the application instructions bulleted list, the phrase 'PFAS Data Application' is bolded in the source but plain text in the output. Additionally, the entire second bullet point 'Application deadline of...' is bolded and underlined in the source, but rendered as plain text without any markdown or underline representation in the output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Application deadline of 4/18/2022 5PM (or may remain open until we have suitable applicant pool) (Underlined and bolded in source)
concerns.output_quote: "Application deadline of 4/18/2022 5PM (or may remain open until we have suitable applicant pool)" (Plain text with no markdown/underline)

concerns.description: Displaced hyperlinks: 2 link(s) extracted as standalone elements instead of inline text
concerns.analysis: standalone_links=2, examples=['https://deq.nc.gov/', 'mailto:DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov']. Links should be inline within paragraphs, not separate blocks.

concerns.description: Source PDF contains 1 instance(s) of blue-styled text without hyperlink annotations. These appear to be intended as hyperlinks but were not annotated in the PDF (likely lost during Word-to-PDF export). This is a source document limitation, not a pipeline defect. Examples: page 3: "DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov"
concerns.analysis: orphaned_blue_text_count=1. Blue text without link annotations detected via PyMuPDF color extraction.

action_items: Add proper mailto href tag to the 'DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov' text.
Restore bold and underline formatting to the specified bullet points in the application instructions section.
